revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Helpbox here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Helpbox for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{Sidebar
| name = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |{{{templatename}}} |{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}
| templatestyles = Template:Helpbox/styles.css
| child templatestyles = {{{child templatestyles|}}}
| float = {{{float|}}}
| class = help-box noprint {{{class|{{{bodyclass|}}}}}}
| style = {{{1|}}}

| titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}}
| title = {{{title|{{{name|}}}}}}
| headingstyle = {{{headingstyle|}}}

| heading1  = {{{group1|}}}
| content1  = {{{list1|}}}
| heading2  = {{{group2|}}}
| content2  = {{{list2|}}}
| heading3  = {{{group3|}}}
| content3  = {{{list3|}}}
| heading4  = {{{group4|}}}
| content4  = {{{list4|}}}
| heading5  = {{{group5|}}}
| content5  = {{{list5|}}}
| heading6  = {{{group6|}}}
| content6  = {{{list6|}}}
| heading7  = {{{group7|}}}
| content7  = {{{list7|}}}
| heading8  = {{{group8|}}}
| content8  = {{{list8|}}}
| heading9  = {{{group9|}}}
| content9  = {{{list9|}}}
| heading10 = {{{group10|}}}
| content10 = {{{list10|}}}
| heading11 = {{{group11|}}}
| content11 = {{{list11|}}}
| heading12 = {{{group12|}}}
| content12 = {{{list12|}}}
| heading13 = {{{group13|}}}
| content13 = {{{list13|}}}
| heading14 = {{{group14|}}}
| content14 = {{{list14|}}}
| heading15 = {{{group15|}}}
| content15 = {{{list15|}}}
| heading16 = {{{group16|}}}
| content16 = {{{list16|}}}
| heading17 = {{{group17|}}}
| content17 = {{{list17|}}}
| heading18 = {{{group18|}}}
| content18 = {{{list18|}}}
| heading19 = {{{group19|}}}
| content19 = {{{list19|}}}
| heading20 = {{{group20|}}}
| content20 = {{{list20|}}}

| navbar = {{#if:{{{templatename|}}} |
    | {{#if:{{{title|}}} |{{#if:{{{name|}}} | |none}}
        | none
        }}
    }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
